metadata.title: Turning a Tight Corner Into an Unexpected Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how quick decisions and steady aim create a clutch moment. This corner peek caught the enemies by surprise and sealed the round fast. What’s your favorite spot for an ambush?

Let me know your best clutch moments in the comments!

#valorant #shorts #gaming #fps #valorantclips
metadata.cta: Let me know your best clutch moments in the comments!
